pan-bagnat.name: Pan Bagnat
instructions: Mix anchovies, garlic, capers, vinegar, and mustard in a medium bowl. Add onion and olives and let sit, tossing occasionally, until onion is slightly softened, 8–10 minutes. Add 2 Tbsp. oil; season with salt and pepper. Toss to combine.
Place tuna in a medium bowl. Zest and juice lemon over tuna. Stir in 2 Tbsp. oil; season with salt and pepper.

Cut bread lengthwise without cutting all the way through. Add basil and parsley to olive mixture and toss to combine. Spread olive mixture over cut sides of baguette. Top with tuna, egg, tomato, and peppers, then drizzle with more oil; season with salt and pepper.
Wrap sandwich tightly in foil and weight down with a heavy skillet, 10 minutes. Cut in half before serving.

pan-roasted-chicken-with-carrots-and-alm.name: Pan-roasted Chicken With Carrots And Almonds
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Toss carrots, almonds, honey, and 2 tablespoons oil on a large rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Roast, tossing occasionally, until carrots are tender, 15-20 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Season chicken with salt and pepper. Cook chicken, skin side down, until golden brown, 5-8 minutes. Turn chicken over, transfer skillet to oven, and roast until cooked through, 10-15 minutes longer.
While chicken and carrots are roasting, mix yogurt and lemon juice in a small bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
Remove chicken and carrots from oven; transfer chicken to a large plate. Add carrots, shallot, and tarragon to skillet and toss to coat in pan drippings. Serve with lemon yogurt.

panini-sandwich-recipe-comedera.name: Panini Sandwich Recipe

ingredients.item: 100 g atula ((lettuce or what you like or have))

instructions: Panini can be made with Italian bread, cyabatta, focaccia, mother mass bread or whatever kind of bread you care about or have. If you're going to do that with a loaf of bread, cut it into 3 / 4 cm thick slice. You can also cut the bread along.

A brush puts the inner parts of the bread with butter or oil onto the inner surface of the bread. The idea is that you put a thin cape together, so make sure you don't put too much olive oil into the bread.
Add a slice of cheese to each side of the sandwich will help to keep the pilling united during cooking.
Now place the prosciutto and ham york or anything you have. You can add as much as you wish and add some freshly ground pepper.
Sobre la sandwichera caliente coloca el panini y coloca un poco de aceite o mantequilla en la parte superior y deja tostar por 2 minutos.
The vegetables we will add to the last ones, once we have roasted the paninis we will open them with care and place the plants that you have.
Cut the panini with a smooth edge knife. A knife with smooth and sharp edge, rather than with dentado edge, will ensure that the finished panini will be completely separated.

parker-house-rolls.name: Parker House Rolls

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk one ¼-oz. envelope active dry yeast (about 2¼ tsp.) and ¼ cup warm water (110°–115°) in a small bowl; let sit until foamy, about 5 minutes.

Heat 1 cup whole milk in a small saucepan over medium until just warm. Combine ¼ cup vegetable shortening, 3 Tbsp. sugar, and 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl. Pour in warm milk, whisking constantly to blend and break up shortening into small clumps (it may not melt completely). Add yeast mixture and 1 large egg, room temperature and whisk to combine. Add 3½ cups (438 g) all-purpose flour and stir vigorously with a wooden spoon until a dough forms. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead with lightly floured hands until smooth, about 5 minutes. Lightly coat a large bowl with vegetable oil; transfer dough to bowl and turn to coat. Cover loosely with plastic wrap. Let sit in a warm spot until doubled in size, about 1½ hours.

Lightly brush a 13x9" baking dish with some of the ¼ cup unsalted butter, melted. Punch down dough; divide into 4 equal pieces. Working one at a time, roll out pieces on a lightly floured surface to a 12x6" rectangle. Cut lengthwise into three 2"-wide strips; cut each strip crosswise to make three 4x2" rectangles (9 total per piece). Brush half of each rectangle (about 2x2") with melted butter, then fold unbuttered side over buttered side, leaving ¼" uncovered at the end. Place rolls, flat side down, starting in a corner of prepared dish, so folded edge is against a short side of the dish. Add rolls side by side to form a long row, then repeat with remaining rolls until you have 4 rows. Brush tops with melted butter, loosely cover with plastic, and chill at least 30 minutes and up to 6 hours.

Preheat oven to 350°. Bake rolls until golden and puffed, 25–35 minutes. Brush with more butter and sprinkle with flaky sea salt. Let cool slightly before serving.
Editor’s note: This Parker House roll recipe was first printed in the 1984 edition of the ‘Fannie Farmer Baking Book.’ It also appeared in our November 2012 Thanksgiving spread. Head this way for more of our best Thanksgiving recipes →

pasta-e-fagioli.name: Pasta E Fagioli

ingredients.item: . dried medium white beans (such as cannellini)

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only, halved lengthwise, coarsely chopped
ribs and stems removed, leaves torn
crushed red pepper flakes, and crusty bread (for serving)

instructions: If you haven’t soaked the beans, do a power soak: Place beans in a large pot, cover with water by 1", and bring to a boil over high heat. As soon as the water comes to a boil, remove pot from heat, stir in a palmful of salt, cover pot, and let beans sit 1 hour.

Pulse carrots, leek, and garlic in a food processor until finely chopped. Heat ⅓ cup oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium. Add chopped vegetables, season generously with salt and pepper, and cook, stirring often, until vegetables start to sweat out some of their liquid, about 4 minutes. The goal at this stage is to slow cook the soffritto until the vegetables are very soft but have not taken on any color. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover pot, and cook, stirring every 5 minutes or so and reducing heat if mixture starts to brown, until vegetables are softened and juicy, about 15 minutes. Add ham hock and cook, uncovered, stirring and scraping bottom of pot every 5 minutes, until soffritto is starting to brown in places and has lost at least half of its volume, about 10 minutes more.

Add beans and their soaking liquid, tomatoes, and kale; season with salt and pepper. Bring to a boil, then add Parmesan rinds (if using) and bay leaves. Reduce heat to medium-low and bring to a gentle simmer. Cook soup with lid askew, adding water (or stock, if you have it) as needed to keep beans submerged by 1", until beans are very tender, 1–3 hours, depending on size and age of beans. Fish out and discard Parmesan rinds. Remove ham hock and use a fork to pull meat off the bone. Return meat to soup; discard bone and any large pieces of fat.

Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling well-salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente, about 3 minutes less than package directions. Drain pasta and add to soup, then taste and season with more salt and pepper if needed. (Do not try to skip a step by cooking the pasta in the soup. The noodles will absorb all the available liquid and the liquid will be thick and gummy.)
Divide soup among bowls. Top with Parmesan, drizzle with oil, and sprinkle with red pepper flakes. Serve with bread for dunking.

pasta-with-20-cloves-of-garlic.name: Pasta With 20 Cloves Of Garlic

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Smash 20 garlic cloves with the flat side of a chef’s knife, then chop very coarsely.

Cook 12 oz. bucatini or spaghetti in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente, about 1 minute less than package directions. Drain, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid; reserve pot.

Meanwhile, heat 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium skillet over medium. Cook garlic, stirring often, until pale golden around the edges, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer garlic to a plate, leaving oil behind.

Add ½ cup panko and 3 Tbsp. nutritional yeast to same skillet and cook, stirring often, until panko is evenly golden brown, about 4 minutes. Remove from heat and add 1 Tbsp. finely grated lemon zest, 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt; stir vigorously to combine. Transfer to a separate plate and let cool.

Heat remaining 4 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in reserved pot over medium-high. Add ⅔ cup (loosely packed) finely chopped parsley, 1 Tbsp. all-purpose flour, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, garlic, and remaining 2 Tbsp. nutritional yeast and 1½ tsp. freshly ground pepper; stir to combine. Cook, stirring occasionally, until parsley is frizzled, about 2 minutes. Pour in 2 cups reserved pasta cooking liquid, bring to a simmer, and cook until sauce is slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.

Transfer pasta to sauce and cook, tossing vigorously, until pasta is al dente and sauce is thickened and coats pasta, about 4 minutes. Remove from heat and add 1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice and 1 tsp. soy sauce; toss to combine. Taste and season with more salt if needed.

Divide pasta among plates or shallow bowls. Sprinkle panko
mixture over.

pastic-lezzet.name: Pastic
instructions: 1. Mix flour, powder sugar, salt and yeast in a deep container.
2. Open the middle in the form of the pool and add sunflower oil with half a glass of warm milk.
3. Remove before your fingertips.
4. Then knead by taking the flour from the edges.
5. Slowly knead until you get a soft dough by adding water.
6. Cover a damp cloth on a warm environment.
7. For inner mortar, add eggs and powder sugar sugar into a deep container, and rub it well until sugar melt.
8. Then add flour, cocoa, baking powder and vanilla and cook.
9. Transfer the oil paper to the rectangular oven tray, and leave to cool by cooking 25 minutes in the oven with a set of 150 degrees and removing from the oven.
10. Take small parts with your hands.
11. 11. Ccinnamon on, raisin, nuts and 1.
12. Add 5 cups of milk and knead thoroughly.
12. August Take the yeast dough into two parts.
14 July Open each piece in rectangle way it will not be too thin.
15. evenly and properly broadcast on the harper you have split into half.
16. Wrap in the form of 7-8 inches thick roll and cut in the width you desire.
17. September Directory to the tray you sprinkled with oil paper.
18. Prepare the remaining dough in the same way.
19. September On the egg yolk and sprinkle sesame.
20.  30 dakika dinlendirin.
21. Bake until the oven with a set of 170 degrees you previously heated.
22. Serve.

pea-quiche-lezzet.name: Pea Quiche
instructions: 1. Mix the butter, salt, baking powder and egg yolks in the room heat into the dough kneading container.
2. Add the flour azar and knead a smooth dough.
3. Put the dough on the ground that is laid out and fine with the roller.
4. Oil and sprinkle the oven mold.
5. Release the dough mold to cover the bottom and edges.
6. Overni is located with fork.
7. Cook for 10-15 minutes in the oven, which is pre-heated to 180 degrees.
8. Leave. from the oven to cool.
9. Mix the cream, eggs and cheese in a pit container.
10. Add and blend peas, corn and salt.
11. 11. Milk and release the bezelyeli cream into the person.
12. Spread the butter on the chopped cream.
13. Cook for 15-20 minutes in oven with 180 degree adjustable.
14 July Leave. from the oven.
15. Serve and serve.

peaches-and-cream-wontons.name: Peaches And Cream Wontons
instructions: Beat cream cheese with an electric mixer on low in a bowl until slightly fluffy. Add peach, confectioners' sugar, and vanilla extract; beat until mixed. Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate to chill slightly, about 10 minutes.
Heat vegetable oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Place a wonton wrapper on a work surface; spoon about 1 tablespoon cream cheese mixture into the center. Pour water into a small bowl, dip your finger in the water, and swipe all 4 sides of the wrapper. Fold one corner of the wrapper over the filling, forming a triangle shape. Press the edges of the wrapper down to seal all the sides. Repeat with remaining wrappers and filling.
Fry 4 to 5 wontons at a time in the hot oil until lightly browned, about 3 minutes per side. Remove with a slotted spoon; drain on a paper towel-lined plate. Repeat with remaining wontons.

pecan-and-chocolate-pralines.name: Pecan And Chocolate Pralines
instructions: Line 2 baking sheets with parchment. Stirring gently, bring 2 cups pecans, both sugars, cream, and butter to a boil in a medium heavy saucepan over medium-high heat. Attach candy thermometer to side of pan. Boil, occasionally swirling pan, until thermometer registers 236°, 7–8 minutes. Remove from heat; stir vigorously with a wooden spoon until mixture thickens and pecans are suspended in syrup, 2–3 minutes.

Drop candy by heaping teaspoonfuls onto prepared sheets. Let cool completely. Spoon some melted chocolate over; place a pecan half on top. Chill until set, about 30 minutes. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 week ahead. Store airtight in refrigerator. Return to room temperature before serving.

pechenye-yabloki-recipe-lezzet.name: Pechenye Yabloki Recipe

ingredients.item: 4–6 pcs of medium size apples (preferably hard and sweet-cook apples, granny smith or golden)
3 tablespoons of powder sugar (or brunette sugar)
Vanilla ice cream or accedilated cream (for service, optional)
Powder sugar instead of brunette sugar, honey, limbaricide or agave snacks can be used.
A lighter sweet selectthe amount of sugar can be reduced.
Walnut or almond can be used instead of nuts, kaju or peanut.
Dried Fruits (dryer, dry cherry, dry wipe) are mixed with a richer inner mortar you can achieve.
As amended, cinnamon of muskat, carnations or groundy ginger can be preferred.
Instead of butter, vegan margarine or coconut oil can be used.
For those who want to reduce the amount of fat, inner can leave the impossible; the natural juicy structure of the fruit can be enough.
Instead of vanilla ice cream can be served with cream, yogurt or laby cheese.
u can increase seecellity by spreading powder or cinnamon

instructions: 1. Heat oven 180 degree’ye.
2. Wash the apples, rremove and play the middle of the light.
3. If you count that apple top part is small cover.
4. Tarç mix sugar and olive oil.
5. Fill this mixture into i&ccedil of apples.
6. U add small butter parts.
7. Prepared apples index to the oven container.
8. Ö from the heated oven to 25–30 minutes, apples soften and bake until lightly caramelize.
9. Serve hot.
10. If you like u vanilla ice cream or ç you can add whipped cream.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

pennsylvania-dutch-pickled-beets-and-egg.name: Pennsylvania-dutch Pickled Beets And Eggs
instructions: Place eggs in a saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil, remove from heat, and let eggs stand in hot water for 15 minutes. Remove eggs from hot water, cool under cold running water, and peel.
Place eggs, beets, and onion in a non-reactive glass or plastic container. Set aside.
Combine sugar, 1 cup reserved beet juice, vinegar, cloves, bay leaves, salt, and pepper in a medium-size, non-reactive saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 5 minutes.
Pour hot liquid over eggs, beets, and onion. Cover and refrigerate 48 hours before using.

persimmon-cake-baked-or-air-fryer-pequer.name: Persimmon Cake, Baked Or Air Fryer
persimmon-cake-baked-or-air-fryer-pequer.original_name: Bizcocho de caqui casero, al horno o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 250 g caqui pulp or very mature persimon (about 2-3 big caquis)
1 above (16 g) of royal-type chemical yeast
Mantequilla o aceite para engrasar el molde

instructions: We peel the cackies and shredded 250 g of caqui pulp till we get a fine purée. Let's have a reservation.
In a big bowl we beat 3 eggs with 120 g of sugar till the mixture is clear and sparkling.
We add 100 ml of sunflower oil and mix well.
We put in the shredded caqui purée and mix again to integrate.
We sample 200 g of flour, 16 g of yeast, 1 pint of salt and, if we like, 1 teaspoon of cinnamon and we add it to the bowl little by little, mixed with soft movements.
Vertemos la masa en un molde previamente engrasado.
We bake at 180 ° C, with heat up and down, for 40-45 minutes, till with a stick we get clear.
Sacamos del horno, dejamos templar unos minutos y desmoldamos sobre una rejilla.

phyllo-pastry-lezzet.name: Phyllo Pastry
instructions: 1. Take the mint to a large bowl for the inner mortar.
2. Salt, pepper, cumin and reindeed onion, salt and spices.
3. Cut the babbles to the two and cut the mixture of milk, yogurt and sunflower oil that you simmer in a separate bowl.
4. Spread the edge from the mined mortar to the start side, which is slightly imported.
5. Wrap in roll shape.
6. Softeners 2 cm thick cut and index to tray.
7. Cook it from the oil mixture on the pre-heated 190 degree oven until the uniforms are fried.
8. melt the butter in a sauce pot.
9. Add pepper and red flakes and get from the stove.
10. Take the baffle in a serving plate, on the garlic yogurt and spicy butter, and serve hot.

11. 11. 11. 11. What is the Pinpoint of the Yufka Börf Recipe? If you want to be in the more tasty and necessary, if you prepare the nail and wait for several hours in the refrigerator before cooking.

pickled-eggplants-argiro.name: Pickled Eggplants
instructions: Remove the stem from the eggplants first and cross-cut them.
Then pour them into boiling water for 8-10 minutes.
Then put them on cutting wood and put on them for a few hours a weight until they drain.
Combine all the chopped vegetables together, fill with these eggplant slits and tie them well with the celery branches.
Add the eggplants in a sterile jar and pour the oil, vinegar and salt.
We leave them for 15 days before we consume them.

pickled-scallions.name: Pickled Scallions
instructions: Trim both ends of scallions and cut in half crosswise. Pack into a 1-pint heatproof jar.
Toast mustard, coriander, and cumin seeds in a dry small saucepan over medium-low heat, tossing often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add to jar.
Bring vinegar, sugar, and salt to a simmer in same saucepan over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugar and salt. Pour brine over scallions and seal jar. Chill at least 1 day before using.
Do Ahead: Scallions can be made 5 days ahead. Cover and chill.

pimiento-mac-and-cheese.name: Pimiento Mac And Cheese

ingredients.item: Drained mild peppadew peppers in brine

instructions: Bring 1/2 cup water, bell pepper, and 11/2 garlic cloves to boil in small saucepan. Cover; reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer until pepper is soft, about 15 minutes.
Toast panko in skillet over medium-high heat until golden, stirring often, 5 to 6 minutes. Transfer to bowl; cool to lukewarm. Rub 1 tablespoon butter into crumbs to coat. Mix in 1/4 cup Parmesan.

Transfer bell pepper mixture to processor. Add Peppadews and 1 tablespoon brine, 2 tablespoons butter, ground chiles, and 1/2 garlic clove; then add cheddar and 1/4 cup Parmesan. Blend until sauce is smooth; season to taste with salt and pepper.

Preheat oven to 204°C. Butter 8-cup baking dish (or 6 individual dishes). Cook pasta in pot of boiling salted water until tender but still firm to bite. Drain; return to pot. Stir sauce and mozzarella into pasta. Season with salt and pepper. Spoon pasta into dish. Sprinkle with crumb topping.
Bake pasta until topping is crisp and sauce is bubbling, about 25 minutes (15 for individual). Let stand 10 minutes.

pineapple-cake-recipe-comedera.name: Pineapple Cake Recipe
pineapple-cake-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta rápida de tarta de piña
instructions: En un bol, agrega los huevos, la lavadura, la harina y la miel.
Mezcla muy bien con la ayuda de una paleta o de un batidor.
In an anti-stick frying pan melt a tablespoon of butter and splits pineapple cuts into a can.
Incorpora la masa, tapa y deja cocer 15 min.
Una vez cocinada agrega un chorrito de miel por encima.

pineapple-pork-adobo.name: Pineapple Pork Adobo

ingredients.item: Cane vinegar (such as datu puti) or unseasoned rice vinegar
Datu puti soy sauce or  0.333 cup other brands soy sauce
Steamed white rice and thinly sliced scallions

instructions: Peel and core pineapple. Cut half of pineapple into bite-size pieces (about 1"); set aside. Chop remaining pineapple into small pieces and transfer to a small saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, until very soft and broken down and nearly all juice is evaporated, 15–18 minutes. Transfer to a blender and add ¼ cup water; purée until smooth.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Lightly season pork with salt and pepper. Working in 2 batches, cook pork until well browned on all sides, 5–8 minutes per batch. Transfer to a plate.

Reduce heat to medium-low and add onion and garlic to same pot. Cook, stirring often, until fragrant and softened, about 5 minutes. Return pork to pot and stir in pineapple purée. Add vinegar, soy sauce, oyster sauce, peppercorns, bay leaves, and ¾ cup water and stir to combine. Bring to a simmer and cover pot. Reduce heat so adobo is at a very gentle simmer and cook until pork is tender, 45–50 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 2 tsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook reserved bite-size pineapple pieces, tossing occasionally, until golden brown all over, 5–8 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Uncover pot and skim off any fat from surface. Increase heat to medium and cook, uncovered, until sauce is thick and shiny, about 15 minutes. Gently stir in caramelized pineapple. Remove and discard bay leaves.
Serve pork adobo over rice, topped with scallions.

pineapple-pork-chops.name: Pineapple Pork Chops
instructions: Mix pineapple with chiles, garlic, cilantro, soy sauce, and fish sauce. Pour over pork chops. (Before marinating, set some marinade aside to use as a dipping sauce.) Cover; chill at least 6 hours and up to 1 day. Remove pork from marinade; grill or broil.

pineapple-salmon.name: Pineapple Salmon
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Heat a large saute pan over medium-high heat for 2 minutes. Coat both sides of salmon fillets with cooking spray and add to the hot pan. Cook for 4 minutes. Flip, cover, and cook for 4 minutes more.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Whisk water, crushed pineapple, and 1/4 cup teriyaki sauce together in a bowl. Pour sauce over salmon; reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and cook for 2 minutes.'}

{'step': '3', 'description': 'Stir pineapple preserves, chili sauce, and remaining 2 teaspoons teriyaki sauce together. Spoon evenly over salmon, cover, and remove from heat. Let stand for 1 to 2 minutes.'}

pineapple-stuffing.name: Pineapple Stuffing
instructions: Combine sugar and butter in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy.
Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in crushed pineapple and bread cubes.
Transfer mixture into prepared baking dish. Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown on top, about 50 minutes to 1 hour. Let stuffing stand for a few minutes before serving.

pineapple-infused-vodka.name: Pineapple-infused Vodka
instructions: Stack pineapple slices in a circle around the edges of a 2-quart wide-mouth glass jar, leaving the center open.
Pour vodka into the jar so pineapple is completely covered.
Seal the jar and store in a cool, dark place for 10 days.
Remove pineapple and strain vodka through a mesh strainer.
Pour back into the jar.
Seal and refrigerate for up to two weeks.

pink-mimosa.name: Pink Mimosa
instructions: Fill a small pitcher with ice. Pour orange juice, sparkling wine, and peach schnapps over ice; stir well.

pisco-punch-with-grilled-lemons.name: Pisco Punch With Grilled Lemons
instructions: Prepare grill for medium heat. Grill lemon halves, cut-side down, until lightly charred, about 2 minutes; let cool.

Squeeze grilled lemons into a large pitcher and add halves; add Pisco, simple syrup, and pineapple juice. Chill 1 hour. Strain into ice-filled rocks glasses, and top with club soda, about 1 oz. per glass.

pistachio-and-mint-pesto.name: Pistachio And Mint Pesto

ingredients.prep: plus more small leaves for serving

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast nuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 5–8 minutes. Let cool. Finely chop 1 Tbsp. nuts and set aside.

Blend oil, salt, pepper, and remaining nuts in a blender until nuts are finely ground. Add 2 cups mint and blend until a coarse purée forms; season with salt and pepper. Transfer dip to a small bowl; stir in Parmesan.
Just before serving, squeeze juice from lemon into dip and stir well. Scatter some mint leaves and reserved toasted nuts over.

pita-bread.name: Pita Bread
instructions: In the bowl of a heavy-duty electric mixer fitted with a dough hook, combine the yeast, sugar, and warm water; stir to blend. Let the yeast stand until foamy, about 5 to 10 minutes.
Stir in the salt. Add the flour, a little at a time, mixing at the lowest speed until all the flour has been incorporated and the dough gathers into a ball; this should take about 4 minutes.

Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead until it's smooth and elastic. Transfer the dough to a lightly oiled bowl, turn it over to coat, and cover with plastic wrap. Allow to rise until double in size, about 1 1/2 hours.
Place a large pizza stone on the lower oven rack, preheat the oven (and stone) to 260°C.

Punch the dough down, divide it into 8 pieces, and gather each piece into a ball; keeping all of them lightly floured and covered while you work. Allow the balls of dough to rest, covered, for 15 minutes so they will be easier to roll out.

Using a rolling pin, roll each dough ball into a circle that is about 8-inches in diameter and 1/4-inch thick. Make sure the circle is totally smooth, with no creases or seams in the dough, which can prevent the pitas from puffing up properly. Cover the disks as you roll them out, but do not stack them up. Put 2 pita rounds at a time on the hot pizza stone and bake for 3 to 4 minutes, or until the bread puffs up like a balloon and is pale golden. Watch closely; they bake fast. Remove the bread from the oven and place on a rack to cool for 5 minutes; they will naturally deflate, leaving a pocket in the center. Wrap the pitas in a large kitchen towel to keep them soft.

pizza-neapolitan-lezzet.name: Pizza Neapolitan
instructions: 1. The dough is kneaded by adding olive oil in the sprinkled countertop.
2. With the help of Merdane 28 cm in place open in the place; and put it in the oily paper-series tray.
3.  Domatesi rendeleyin.
4. Fine slice of garlic.
5. Cook the pan with sugar and olive oil for 8-10 minutes.
6. Tomato paste u broadcast on the car.
7. Place ançuez, sliced mozzarella, capari and fine sliced red pepper u on the car.
8. Bake for 15 minutes in oven with a heated 180 degree.
9. U visit olive oil and wealth hot.
10.  Afiyet olsun.
11. 11. You can reach the recipe of pizza dough, which is easy to use instead of bread dough in the recipe.

poached-lobster-with-vegetable-macedonia.name: Poached Lobster With Vegetable Macedonia

ingredients.item: A pinch of piment d'espelette or hot paprika

instructions: Peel and wash 2 carrots with tops and 3 turnips with tops. Wash and de-string 2 handfuls of French beans. Cut these vegetables into very small dice (brunoise).
Shell a handful of fresh peas.
Heat salted water in a saucepan and prepare a bowl of water and ice cubes.
Immerse all the vegetables in the boiling water for 4 minutes, then drain and plunge them in the ice water. Drain once more, put in a large bowl, and set aside.

Pour 3 quarts of water and 1 3/4 cups of white wine into a large cooking pot. Add 10 black peppercorns and bring to a boil. Plunge a 1 1/2-pound lobster into the liquid, put on the lid, and cook for 5 minutes once it returns to a boil.
Take the lobster out and, as soon as it's not burning hot, shell the tail, elbows, and claws. Remove the black intestinal vein. Take the sand sac from the head and collect the coral.
Cut the shell of the head and tail in half lengthwise. Rinse and dry them.
Cut up the meat and add it to the bowl of vegetables.

Trim, wash, and finely chop 2 scallions and put them in a bowl. Add the lobster coral, 1/2 cup Greek-style yogurt, the juice of an unwaxed lemon, a little of its grated zest, and a pinch of Piment d'Espelette or hot paprika. Taste and correct the seasoning with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Pour this sauce into the bowl of vegetables and lobster. Stir gently, then distribute this mixture into the shells of the half tails and half heads.
Arrange on a dish and keep cold until serving.

polenta-with-green-beans-mushrooms-peas-.name: Polenta With Green Beans, Mushrooms, Peas, And Leeks

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only; about 2 medium

instructions: Blanch green beans 1 minute in boiling water. Add peas and cook until both beans and peas are crisp-tender, about 3 minutes. Transfer to bowl of ice water to cool. Drain. Cut beans on diagonal into 1-inch pieces. Set beans and peas aside.

Bring milk and broth to boil in large saucepan over high heat. Reduce heat to medium. Gradually whisk in polenta. Reduce heat to low. Cook until polenta is very thick, whisking almost constantly, about 10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Remove from heat; cover to keep warm.

Meanwhile, combine leeks and vermouth in medium saucepan. Boil over medium-high heat until reduced to 1/3 cup, 8 minutes. Remove from heat. Gradually whisk in butter, allowing each addition to melt before adding next. Add cream and whisk over very low heat to blend. Season with salt and pepper. Set aside.

Heat oil in large skillet over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms and sauté until almost tender, 5 minutes. Stir in shallots, 1 tablespoon parsley, and thyme. Sauté until mushrooms are very tender, about 5 minutes. Add beans and peas, tossing to coat.
Rewarm polenta and spoon into large shallow bowl. Top with green bean mixture and remaining 1 tablespoon parsley. Rewarm leeks over low heat, whisking constantly; spoon evenly over polenta.

pork-belly-sisig.name: Pork Belly Sisig
instructions: In a large bowl add annatto oil, lemongrass, ½ red onion, 2 smashed garlic cloves, vinegar, soy sauce, fish sauce, sugar, salt, and pepper. Mix to make a marinade, then rub the pork belly with this marinade and cover with a lid. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or, for best results, overnight.
Grill your marinated pork belly until it is cooked, about 10 minutes, flipping a few times for good color.
Cool the pork belly for a few minutes and chop into small pieces.
In a bowl, add the pork mixture and add more (3 tbsp) vinegar, (3 tbsp) soy sauce, and red onion for that extra sour and salty traditional flavor.
Broil for 5 minutes or until crispy.
Garnish with an egg on top, remaining onion, green onions, and red chili peppers. Add as little or as much red chili to make spicy sisig.
Serve with lime.

pork-loin-with-savoy-cabbage-crumbs-tele.name: Pork Loin With Savoy Cabbage Crumbs
pork-loin-with-savoy-cabbage-crumbs-tele.original_name: Lombo de porco com migas de couve lombarda

ingredients.item: 1 lombo de porco limpo com aprox. 1,500 kg
2 colheres (sopa) de vinagre de vinho tinto

instructions: Start the oven at 180 degrees. Peel the garlic, pick them very finely, throw them into a small bowl, add the lard and mix well. Place the loin on a tray, bar it with this mixture, season it with salt and pepper, add the blond and white wine and bring it to the oven for 1 hour and 20 minutes, turning and watering from time to time with the sauce itself.

Peel the onions and cut them in buds. Light a pot with the olive oil, add the onion and let it cook until soft. Drain the naked tomatoes, cut them in buds, add to the pot, season with salt and pepper and mix. Reduce the heat and let cook for 15 minutes, stirring from time to time. Add the rosemary and vinegar, cover and turn off the fire.

Make the migas: cut the cabbage into pieces, take them to cook in seasoned water with salt for 12 minutes, then drain and reserve the water. Break the bread into small pieces, lay them in a bowl and water them with the water to boil the cabbage gradually until it is well soaked but not soaked. Peel and mince the garlic, lay them down for a pot, add the olive oil, take it to the fire and let them cook until they are golden. Then add the bread, mix well, add the cabbage, wrap, rectify the salt and stir well.
Coloque o lombo de porco numa travessa, cubra com a mistura do tomate e sirva decorado a gosto e acompanhado com as migas.

pork-vindaloo.name: Pork Vindaloo

ingredients.item: Dried kashmiri chiles or 12 guajillo chiles
. diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: boneless pork shoulder (Boston butt), cut into 1" pieces

instructions: Blend 15 dried Kashmiri chiles or 12 guajillo chiles, 8 garlic cloves, finely chopped, one 1" piece ginger, peeled, one 3" cinnamon stick, broken into pieces, ½ cup distilled white vinegar, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. tamarind paste (if using), 1 tsp. black peppercorns, 1 tsp. cumin seeds, ½ tsp. ground turmeric, ½ tsp. whole cloves, and 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a blender (preferably high-speed), scraping down sides as needed, until marinade is the consistency of a fine paste.

Place 1½ lb. skinless, boneless pork shoulder (Boston butt), cut into 1" pieces, and 8 oz. skin-on pork belly, cut into 1" pieces, in a medium bowl and pour marinade over; toss to coat. Let sit at room temperature at least 30 minutes.

Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Cook 1 medium onion, quartered, thinly sliced, stirring often, until translucent, about 5 minutes. Add pork shoulder and belly along with any marinade remaining in bowl; stir to combine. Pour in 2½ cups water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover pot, and simmer, stirring occasionally and adding up to ½ cup more water if needed, until pork is tender and liquid is slightly thickened, 1½–2 hours. Taste and add more salt if needed.

Divide steamed rice among bowls and ladle stew over.
Do ahead: Pork shoulder and belly can be marinated 1 day ahead; cover and chill. Stew can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

portion-stuffed-cabbage-recipe-lezzet.name: Portion Stuffed Cabbage Recipe

2 cups of water or vegetable suy  u

Tomato paste in pepper can be used in pesto or olive oil sauces.

pot-roast-shepherds-pie.name: Pot Roast Shepherd’s Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C).
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Pat the chuck roast dry with paper towels, then sprinkle all over with the salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Add the olive oil to the hot Dutch oven, and carefully add the chuck roast. Sear until browned on all sides, then remove the beef.
To the same pot, add the onion, garlic cloves, and celery. Cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add the tomato paste, and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Add the beef broth, red wine, Worcestershire, bouillon, carrots, thyme sprigs, rosemary, and bay leaves.
Place the chuck roast back in the pot, and cover. Place in the preheated oven, and roast until the meat is tender 2½-3 hours.

While the beef is in the oven, prepare the potatoes. Boil in a large pot of water until tender, about 15 minutes. Drain the potatoes, then add the milk, butter, and salt to taste. Mash until smooth and creamy.
After 2½-3 hours, the chuck roast should be tender. Reduce the sauce if it's not thick enough by removing the beef and simmering on low until the sauce can coat the back of a spoon.
Add the beef to a baking dish. Top evenly with mashed potatoes and mozzarella cheese. Bake at 191°C until golden, for about 20 minutes.
Garnish with thyme leaves, and enjoy!

potato-pie-roll-argiro.name: Potato Pie Roll
instructions: Heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Sauté all vegetables for 10 minutes until they wither without color.
Add the herbs and let them cool.
We'll use them for the mixture soon.
Boil the potatoes, melt them in mashed potatoes and add them to a bowl.
Add the milk, flour and eggs and mix well.
Finally, add the sauteed cold vegetables and check the salt and pepper.
Allow the mixture to cool well.
Open the leaves on the counter.
Butter 1 leaf and fold it in half.
Add along both the one and the opposite side of the leaf, filling with a spoon or cornet.
Wrap the leaf on both sides so that both rolls meet in the middle.
Break the edges so that it does not empty or fill and enter it underneath.
Place on an oily baking pan.
We also make the rest of the double rolls.

potato-salad.name: Potato Salad

ingredients.item: Plus 2 tbsp. diamond crystal or  0.5 cup plus 2 tbsp. morton   kosher salt

ingredients.prep: ribs and seeds removed, cut into  0.25" pieces
paprika, or freshly ground black pepper (for serving)

instructions: Bring 10 medium Yukon Gold potatoes (about 3 lb.), 1 cup Diamond Crystal or ½ cup plus 1 Tbsp. Morton kosher salt, and 3 quarts cold water to a simmer in a large pot over medium heat; cook potatoes until tender, 18–22 minutes.

Meanwhile, using a slotted spoon, carefully lower 4 large eggs into a medium saucepan of boiling water and cook, adjusting heat as needed to maintain a gentle boil, 10 minutes. Transfer eggs to a bowl of ice water and let cool until just slightly warm, about 2 minutes.

Remove eggs from ice water. Gently crack all over and peel; discard shells. Cut eggs in half lengthwise and scoop out yolks into a large bowl. Coarsely chop egg whites; set aside. Mash yolks with a fork until smooth. Add 1 cup mayonnaise, ¼ cup sweet relish, 3 Tbsp. yellow mustard, 2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, and remaining 2 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. Morton kosher salt; mix well. Fold in 1 medium red bell pepper, ribs and seeds removed, cut into ¼" pieces, ½ medium red onion, cut into ¼" pieces, and 2 celery stalks, sliced ¼" thick.
Drain potatoes; let cool 5 minutes. Peel with a paring knife; cut into ½" pieces. Add to dressing and gently toss; fold in reserved egg whites. Cover and chill at least 1 hour and up to 3 days.

Sprinkle with Barbecue Seasoning, paprika, or freshly ground black pepper before serving.

Light a pot with the remaining butter and crushed garlic. Add the rice and let it fry a little. Add twice the volume of rice in water and season with salt.

When the rice rises boiling, have the lemons sliced on top to cover. Cover the pot and put the fire at least. Let it cook for 10 minutes. Serve as a follow-up to the gambas, splashing everything with chopped coriander.

prepare-a-delicious-papaya-sorbet-step-b.name: Prepare A Delicious Papaya Sorbet Step By Step

80 ml of freshly squeezed natural orange juice
1 to 2 cds of agave syrup, vegetable honey or coconut sugar
1 cda cold water or coconut water

instructions: Cut the papaya into medium cubes and place it into an unwrapped charola.
Congele the papaya for at least 4 hours or until completely solid.
Coloca la papaya congelada en la licuadora o procesador de alimentos.
Add orange juice, lemon juice, sweetener, coconut water or water, salt and frilling if you use them.
It processes with pulses and gets a smooth, thick and creamy blend.
It serves as a soft Sorbet or freezes 30 to 45 minutes for a firmer texture.

prepare-a-devil-dip-with-cream-cheese-fo.name: Prepare A Devil Dip With Cream Cheese For Your Meetings And Parties

In a medium bowl, mix the cream cheese with the ham with an endylated ham and get a consistent paste.
It incorporates mustard, english sauce and honey. Revolve with a manual scatula or beaker.
Add paprika, black pepper and onion powder. Mix well so that flavors are integrated.
Test the mixture and add some drops of lemon to highlight flavors and balance ham salinity.
Put the dip into a small or padded bin, sprinkle the chopped parsley above and refrigerate it for a firmer texture for 15 minutes.

prepare-a-juicy-pulled-chicken-wrap-come.name: Prepare A Juicy Pulled Chicken Wrap
prepare-a-juicy-pulled-chicken-wrap-come.original_name: Prepara un jugoso wrap de pulled chicken
instructions: En una olla grande, calienta el aceite de oliva a fuego medio.

Cooking with medium-low heat for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is fully cooked.
Remove the chicken from the pot and crumble with two forks.
In a small bowl, mix mayonnaise with lemon juice, salt and pepper.
Coloca una tortilla en un plato y unta una capa de la mezcla de mayonesa.
Add a portion of pitted chicken to the centre of the omelette.
Agrega lechuga picada en tiras, tomate y el aguacate en rodajas y queso rallado sobre el pollo.
Wrap up the omelette to form the wrap, and make sure you bend the ends so that the pilling doesn't get out.

prepare-strawberry-mug-cake-with-cream-c.name: Prepare Strawberry Mug Cake With Cream
prepare-strawberry-mug-cake-with-cream-c.original_name: Prepara mug cake de fresas con crema

Now we go with the liquid ingredients, add milk, vanilla and oil.
With the help of a fork you will mix till you get a consistent texture.
Now, add strawberries and mix till integrated.
Cooking in the microwave at high temperature for 1: 30-2 minutes, making sure it doesn't spill.

Once cold, add the beamed cream, then strawberries to decorate.
Enjoy!

prepare-these-chocolate-popcorn-step-by-.name: Prepare These Chocolate Popcorn Step By Step

It incorporates the corn for Popcorn, cover and gently moves the pot so that the heat will be evenly distributed.

Retira del fuego y pasa las palomitas a un bowl grande, retirando los granos que no hayan explotado.
Destroy semi-bitter chocolate and milk-to-bath chocolate or at short microwave intervals, constantly mixed.
Add butter and pint of salt to melted chocolate to get a bright and homogenous blend.
Vierte el chocolate caliente sobre las palomitas y mezcla con movimientos envolventes para cubrirlas de manera uniforme.
Add citrus or nuts if you wish to have an extra touch.
Extiende las palomitas sobre una bandeja con papel encerado y deja reposar hasta que el chocolate se endurezca ligeramente antes de servir.

prepare-this-delicious-chickpea-salad-wi.name: Prepare This Delicious Chickpea Salad With Cucumber And Cod
prepare-this-delicious-chickpea-salad-wi.original_name: Prepara esta rica ensalada de garbanzos con pepino y bacalao

Then get his tomato and get his pieces broken. Do the same with the white onion and the red pepper. Be sure to have them cut well to have a better presentation.
En un bol, agrega el pepino, la cebolla, el pimiento y el tomate cortado.
Posteriormente, agrega los garbanzos cocidos y el bacalao desalado desmenuzado o deshebrado.
Season with salt to taste, some olive oil and lemon juice. Mix well till everything's perfectly integrated and seasoned.
Sirve en porciones y esparce el perejil troceado.
Enjoy!

puff-pastry-with-strawberries-argiro.name: Puff Pastry With Strawberries

ingredients.item: 250 gr strawberries and raspberries or raspberries (ripe)
100 grams of cream cheese in a warm room.
250 gr strawberries and raspberries or raspberries (ripe)
100 grams of cream cheese in a warm room.

instructions: For the quick strawberries puff pastry, first defrost the puff pastry in the refrigerator maintenance and keep it cold in the refrigerator. Preheat the oven to 200 degrees C in the air. We'll fry on the middle grill. We choose strawberries, red, ripe and firm. Wash them, dry them and remove the stem. Cut them into thin slices and set aside. In a bowl, add the cream cheese and mix with a spoon to fluffy. Add the vanilla and sugar and mix. Put it aside. Spread the cold sfoliata leaf on a sheet lined with non-stick baking paper. Place the puff pastry lightly along the long side without cutting it down into three equal and wide stripes. Leave the middle stripe blank and cut the two side pieces of puff pastry into 12 diagonal strips. Brush with jam the whole middle along the stripe. Cover with the soft cream cheese and add the chopped strawberries on top. Close up and down the center of the puff pastry, which is filled with the ingredients. Close the side crosses on the filling. Brush with egg solution the whole surface of the puff pastry and sprinkle with some crystalline sugar. Bake on the medium grill for 30 minutes to brown very well and puff. Cut into six or eight pieces and serve with strawberry sauce.
Preheat the oven to 200 degrees C in the air. We'll fry on the middle grill.
We choose strawberries, red, ripe and firm.
Wash them, dry them and remove the stem.
Cut them into thin slices and set aside.
In a bowl, add the cream cheese and mix with a spoon to fluffy.
Add the vanilla and sugar and mix. Put it aside.
Spread the cold sfoliata leaf on a sheet lined with non-stick baking paper.
Place the puff pastry lightly along the long side without cutting it down into three equal and wide stripes.
Leave the middle stripe blank and cut the two side pieces of puff pastry into 12 diagonal strips.
Brush with jam the whole middle along the stripe. Cover with the soft cream cheese and add the chopped strawberries on top.
Close up and down the center of the puff pastry, which is filled with the ingredients.
Close the side crosses on the filling.
Brush with egg solution the whole surface of the puff pastry and sprinkle with some crystalline sugar.
Bake on the medium grill for 30 minutes to brown very well and puff.
Cut into six or eight pieces and serve with strawberry sauce.

pumpkin-banana-pancakes.name: Pumpkin Banana Pancakes
instructions: Sift all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon together into a bowl; set aside.
Combine banana, milk, pumpkin, oil, and egg in a separate bowl; stir in flour mixture just until moistened.

Heat a lightly oiled griddle over medium heat. Drop batter by large spoonfuls onto the griddle; cook until bubbles form and the edges are dry, 3 to 4 minutes. Flip; cook until browned on the other side, 2 to 3 minutes. Repeat with remaining batter.

pumpkin-cheesecake-enchiladas.name: Pumpkin Cheesecake Enchiladas
instructions: Line a sieve with paper towels and place over a bowl. Place pumpkin puree on the paper towels and cover the bowl with plastic wrap. Place in the refrigerator and allow to drain for 2 hours, or overnight.

Beat cream cheese with an electric mixer until very smooth. Add 1/2 cup white sugar, brown sugar, pudding mix, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, and nutmeg and mix until well blended. Mix in drained pumpkin. Divide mixture among tortillas and roll them up.
Combine remaining 1/4 cup sugar and 1 teaspoon cinnamon in a small bowl and stir until well combined.
Brush each stuffed tortilla with melted butter and sprinkle with cinnamon-sugar mixture.
Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Place as many enchiladas in the preheated air fryer as will fit in a single layer with at least 1/4 of an inch in between. Air-fry until golden brown and lightly crisp, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove to a serving tray and let cool. Repeat to air-fry remaining enchiladas.
Just before serving, top evenly with whipped topping, caramel sauce, and graham cracker crumbs.

pumpkin-children-teleculinaria.name: Pumpkin Children

ingredients.item: -  raspa de casca de laranja q.b.

instructions: Peel the pumpkin, cut it into pieces and bake it into salty water. Then the pumpkin drains very well, throw it in a bowl and add the flour and yeast.
Add the yolks and sugar.
Junte um pouco de raspa e sumo de laranja.
Then add the brandy and beat it very well.
On the other hand, beat the clears into castle and wrap them in the preparation.
Take to fry in oil spoonfuls from the previous preparation, few at a time, until they are golden. Take it off, let it drip on kitchen paper, then go through a mixture of sugar and cinnamon and serve.

pumpkin-cornmeal-pancakes.name: Pumpkin Cornmeal Pancakes
instructions: Whisk flour, cornmeal, brown sugar, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and cloves together in a large bowl. Beat milk, pumpkin, eggs, 2 tablespoon vegetable oil, and vanilla extract together in another bowl. Add milk mixture to flour mixture and stir until batter is well-combined.

Heat about 1 tablespoon oil in a griddle over medium-high heat. Drop batter by large spoonfuls onto the griddle and cook until bubbles form and the edges are dry, 3 to 4 minutes. Flip and cook until browned on the other side, 2 to 3 minutes. Repeat with remaining batter.

pumpkin-spice-icebox-cake.name: Pumpkin Spice Icebox Cake

ingredients.prep: split lengthwise, or 2 teaspoons vanilla paste or extract
pecan praline, or chocolate butter toffee bar, chopped (for topping)

instructions: Real Talk: If you REALLY don’t want to bother with the layering, serve this in small bowls, cups, or clear jars as individual parfaits (a spoonful of pumpkin mixture, a spoonful of cream, with crumbled graham crackers and candy on top). Don’t worry, we won’t comment on how lazy you are.

Scrape seeds from vanilla beans into a large bowl; reserve pods for another use. These babies are expensive! You can blend them with salt or sugar to make vanilla-infused seasonings, add them to simple syrup, or cover them in a jar with vodka to make your own vanilla extract. Sweet!
Anyway, back to the recipe. Add cream and a pinch of salt to bowl. Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat until stiff peaks form.

Whisk pumpkin pureé, brown sugar, mascarpone, condensed milk, pumpkin pie spice, ginger, and ¼ tsp. salt in a medium bowl until smooth. Fold 1½ cups whipped cream into pumpkin mixture until combined and no streaks of white remain.

Using a spatula or spoon, schmear a thin layer of remaining whipped cream  in the center of a large serving plate (make sure it’s big enough so 3 graham crackers can cover it). Place 3 graham crackers, side by side with the long sides touching, over cream. Lightly brush tops with coffee. Spread ¾ cup pumpkin mixture evenly over crackers. Top with ½ cup whipped cream and spread evenly to edges. Repeat with remaining layers, ending with whipped cream. Make it all swirly and pretty if you’d like. Chill, uncovered, until crackers have softened, at least 3 hours and up to 6. Top with chopped brittle before serving.
